name: Archon Thanis
title: Last Archon of the Ruined Court
personality: Thanis speaks in remembered tenses. Past, future, never present.
appearance: Tall, gaunt, robes of sun-bleached purple, half-mask of cracked porcelain.
background: Last of the original Court. Has lived three centuries by the rite of refusal.

narrative_context.secret: Thanis shares a glyph-language with Oracle Nesha Keep. A strength-6 spell minted in one world is heard by the other.

dialogue_style: archaic, slow, drops one truth per audience

name: Calla Bren
title: Rebel Captain
personality: Calla leads with conscience, fights with both hands, sleeps with one eye open.
appearance: Mid-thirties, weather-beaten, leather-and-chain breastplate, long sword on the hip.
background: Led the third uprising. Lost it. Is leading the fourth.

narrative_context.secret: Calla and Sandrun's Iyatte once met in a tunya tavern as girls. Neither has admitted it.

name: Hen Orven
title: Court Scribe
personality: Hen has written every Court decision for thirty years. He has read none of them since the first ten.
appearance: Sixty, stooped, ink-stained fingers, half-rim spectacles always on his nose.
background: Was almost made Archon. Refused. Took the scribe's chair instead.

narrative_context.secret: Hen has a copy of the original Refusal Field engraving. Asbir Thelane (hub) wants it.

name: Zaen Drift
title: Court Champion
personality: Zaen says less than he knows and knows more than he should.
appearance: Forty, lean, sun-darkened, sword scars on both hands.
background: Champion to four Archons. Has buried three.

narrative_context.secret: Zaen has met Calla Bren in disguise twice. Has not killed her.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Expose Zaen; Court loses its champion.

name: Silv Marn
title: Refused-Mother
personality: Silv refused the rite forty years ago and has lived as a refused-mother since.
appearance: Seventy-eight, silver-haired, leather cloak with seven brass clasps.
background: Has refused four marriages, three kingdoms, two heirs, and the death of one child.

narrative_context.secret: Silv knows how to undo the compound refusal once it sets in.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If the hub dome ruptures, only Silv can stabilise it.

name: Arn Tev
title: Refused Healer
personality: Arn refuses the king's coin. Heals everyone anyway.
appearance: Fifties, scarred forearms, simple linen smock, herb pouches on the belt.
background: Trained in the Court infirmary. Walked out when the Court started signing death warrants.

narrative_context.secret: Arn smuggles refugees out of the ruins to Pia Thalis in the hub.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Expose the chain; both infirmaries close.

name: Finn Bren
title: Calla's Younger Brother
personality: Thirteen years old. Already a courier. Refuses to fight.
appearance: Small, fast, dirty linen tunic, rebel ribbon around the left wrist.
background: Calla's only sibling. The rebellion's youngest active member.

narrative_context.secret: Finn runs messages cross-world via the Verge bog (with Nymeria's witch knowledge).
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Trace Finn; the cross-world messenger chain breaks.

name: Pol Rim
title: Sun-Bleached Trader
personality: Pol takes silver, takes refused-coin, takes promises if you sign them.
appearance: Forty-eight, sun-bleached, gold tooth, dust-coloured cloak.
background: Has traded between Court and rebels for two decades. Considers it patriotism.

narrative_context.secret: Pol's caravan runs through a bog road that leads to the fantasy Verge.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Use the road; cross-world trade explodes.
